_meta.note: Upload uses Firestore auto document IDs. JSON has no per-course keys: use the top-level 'courses' array. Each app run that uploads creates new documents unless you de-duplicate in console.

field_rules.order: number (int, 0+). Unlocks next course: householder gating uses trainingUnlockedUpToOrder on users/{uid}.
field_rules.title: string
field_rules.isActive: boolean, only isActive==true is listed in app
field_rules.videoUrl: string, HTTPS MP4 URL (use a bucket that allows anonymous read, or a public CDN; Google gtv-videos-bucket sample URLs are often AccessDenied for anonymous now)
field_rules.quiz: array of { id, prompt, options: string[], correctIndex: int (0-based) }. App currently uses the first item only in UI.

courses.title: Waste Sorting Basics
courses.description: Learn how to separate wet, dry, and hazardous waste and label bins for safer collection.

quiz.prompt: Which bin should food scraps go into?

challenge.prompt: Upload a photo of your labeled waste bins at home.
challenge.caption: Photo proof • AI / ops review

courses.title: Recycling Best Practices
courses.description: Rinse, dry, and sort common recyclables so more material actually gets recycled (not landfilled).

quiz.prompt: Before recycling a bottle, you should…

challenge.prompt: Upload a photo of clean, sorted recyclables ready for pickup.
challenge.caption: Upload proof • validation

courses.title: Used cooking oil at home
courses.description: Cool, store, and label used cooking oil in a sealed container before Kindra handover.

quiz.prompt: Best container for used oil is…

challenge.prompt: Take a photo of a sealed, labeled used-oil container.
challenge.caption: Sealed container • check

courses.title: Hazardous Waste Safety
courses.description: Handle batteries, chemicals, and sharps safely; never mix with general household waste.

challenge.prompt: Upload a photo of your e-waste or sharp-safe box.
challenge.caption: E-waste / safety • review
